context: User wants to show a toast notification when files are edited.

checklist.name: Uses event hook
checklist.description: Plugin implements the `event` hook to listen for events

checklist.name: Filters for file edit events
checklist.description: Checks event type to handle only file edit/write events

checklist.name: Uses client.tui.showToast or equivalent
checklist.description: Calls the appropriate TUI API to display the toast notification

checklist.name: Plugin structure is correct
checklist.description: Async factory function returning hooks object with proper TypeScript typing
